name: Loam
notes: The ideal garden soil. Holds moisture well while draining excess water. Rich in nutrients and easy to work.

name: Sandy Loam
notes: Warms up quickly, easy to dig. Drains fast — needs frequent watering and fertilizing.

name: Clay
notes: Holds nutrients and moisture well but drains slowly. Compacts easily. Improve with compost and grit.

name: Sandy
notes: Very free-draining; low nutrient retention. Ideal for cacti, succulents, and drought-tolerant plants.

name: Silty
notes: Fertile and moisture-retentive but can compact. Excellent for vegetables with added organic matter.

name: Chalky / Alkaline
composition: Calcium carbonate (chalk/limestone) with clay or loam base
notes: Very alkaline. Limits nutrient availability. Suitable for brassicas, sweet peas, and lavender.

name: Peat
notes: Highly acidic and moisture-retentive. Ideal for acid-loving plants like blueberries and azaleas.

name: All-Purpose Potting Mix
composition: Peat or coco coir, perlite, vermiculite, lime
notes: Commercial blend for container gardening. Lightweight, sterile, consistent.

name: Seed Starting Mix
composition: Fine peat/coco coir, perlite, vermiculite — low nutrient
notes: Fine-grained, sterile medium for germination. Nutrient-poor by design — seedlings get nutrition from cotyledons initially.

name: Cactus & Succulent Mix
notes: Fast-draining for drought-tolerant plants. Prevents root rot in succulents and cacti.

name: Raised Bed Mix
notes: Balanced mix formulated for raised beds. Nutrient-rich and well-draining.

name: Compost
notes: Soil amendment rather than a standalone growing medium. Improves drainage in clay and water retention in sandy soils.

name: Hydroponic Grow Medium (Rockwool)
notes: Sterile, inert grow medium for hydroponics. Soak in pH 5.5 water before use.

name: Hydroponic Grow Medium (Clay Pebbles)
notes: Reusable inert medium for DWC, ebb-and-flow, and drip systems. pH neutral once rinsed.

name: Coconut Coir
notes: Sustainable peat alternative. Excellent water retention and aeration. Low nutrient content.
